race.comment: Competitive contest to open the card. BOLE LE (1) is knocking on the door of another victory with consecutive runner-up finishes and strikes a winnable assignment here. Has placed two from three over this distance range and should be right there when the whips are cracking. THE BOSS MAN (4) is a consistent conveyance who has only missed the top-five once in eight career outings. Strips fitter second-up and gets 2kg weight relief with the claim. Ticks a few boxes. ITZA MOTZA (3) will be rock-hard fit for this and maps nicely from gate six. Top-three aspirations on best figures. FORTY TIMES (2) boasts a win and a placing from three spins here around his home circuit and rates among the better hopes. HIGH SECURITY (5) best of the rest from the inside alley.
